channel.title: briefUpdatesBreakingOffshootNL
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesBreakingOffshootNL, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: A powerful winter storm is roiling travel across the northeastern U.S.
item.description: Forecasters called travel conditions "extremely treacherous" and "nearly impossible" in areas hit hardest by the storm, and air and train traffic is a...

item.title: U.K. Police Arrest Peter Mandelson, Ex-Ambassador to the U.S., Amid Epstein Accusations
item.description: Peter Mandelson was arrested on Monday on suspicion of “misconduct in public office” following revelations about his dealings with Jeffrey Epstein, th...

item.title: After Saks Bankruptcy, Richard Baker Says He Saved Luxury Department Stores
item.description: Richard Baker wanted to create a retail empire when he combined Saks Fifth Avenue and Neiman Marcus. About a year later, it filed for bankruptcy.

item.title: The FDA creates a quicker path for gene therapies
item.description: The Food and Drug Administration aims to evaluate treatments for rare diseases based on plausible evidence that they would work — without requiring a ...

item.title: BAFTAs apologize after guest with Tourette syndrome uses racial slur during ceremony
item.description: A man with Tourette syndrome shouted a racial slur and other offensive remarks during the BAFTA awards ceremony Sunday. The BBC did not edit out his o...

item.title: What Travelers Need to Know as Cartel Violence Rattles Mexico
item.description: The killing of a drug lord and the unrest that followed have prompted flight cancellations, roadblocks, cruise disruptions and “shelter in place” aler...

item.title: A new lawsuit alleges DHS illegally tracked and intimidated observers
item.description: Observers watching federal immigration enforcement in Maine who were told by agents they were "domestic terrorists" and would be added to a "database"...

item.title: 'Everything was in pieces:' Lindsey Vonn describes grueling surgery on broken leg
item.description: In a recent video, the Olympic skier credits her surgeon with saving her leg from potential amputation.

item.title: France Summons U.S. Ambassador Over Comments on Activist’s Killing
item.description: Charles Kushner, President Trump’s envoy to Paris, was called in after the State Department cited “violent radical leftism” in the beating death of Qu...

item.title: U.K. Police Arrest Peter Mandelson, Ex-Ambassador to the U.S., Amid Epstein Accusations
item.description: Peter Mandelson was arrested on Monday on suspicion of “misconduct in public office” following revelations about his dealings with Jeffrey Epstein, th...

item.title: Live Updates: Mexico Remains on Edge After Killing of Cartel Boss Sparked Violence
item.description: A military raid targeted “El Mencho,” the head of a powerful criminal organization, and set off violence across the country. Officials said at least 6...

item.title: Videos Show How Violence Unfolded in Mexico After Killing of Cartel Boss
item.description: Armed groups blocked roads and set fire to supermarkets and banks after the Mexican government killed Mexico’s most-wanted cartel boss.

item.title: Scenes From New York City’s First Real Snow Day in Years
item.description: Across the five boroughs, New Yorkers sledded and frolicked, but the best moments were when the city stood still.

item.title: Videos Show How Violence Unfolded in Mexico After Killing of Cartel Boss
item.description: Armed groups blocked roads and set fire to supermarkets and banks after the Mexican government killed Mexico’s most-wanted cartel boss.

item.title: Europe’s New Way of War
item.description: Can Europe defend itself without the United States? A new strategic vision says yes.
